findings.description: Majority of sessions (68%) have random adjective+noun names that provide no content context
findings.expected: Sessions should be named based on their content
findings.actual: Names like 'Fuzzy Canyon', 'Crispy Meadow', 'Swift Breeze' give no indication of conversation content

findings.description: Multiple sessions named 'New Conversation' with no differentiation
findings.expected: Each session should have a unique, meaningful name
findings.actual: At least 4 sessions are named 'New Conversation'

findings.description: Some sessions have content-based names suggesting auto-naming works intermittently
findings.expected: All sessions with content should be auto-named
findings.actual: Only ~23% of sessions have content-based names
